display.purpose: Hero and section-opener headlines. Poppins 800, tight tracking. Never more than 14 characters per line.

title.purpose: Card headers, nav labels, strong UI text. Poppins 600.

body.purpose: Prose and content. Poppins 400. Hard cap at 70ch.

label.purpose: Section tags, metadata, uppercase utility text. Poppins 600, tracked.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Teal-tinted ambient glow on hover for primary buttons. Appears on hover only — never at rest.

motion.name: ease-kinetic
motion.purpose: Expo ease-out. Default easing for all choreographed entrances and layout transitions.

motion.name: ease-quick
motion.purpose: Quart ease-out. Fast micro-interactions: hover color changes, focus rings.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Teal-anchor fill, sharp corners, uppercase tracked label. Hover: deeper teal + slight lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(55% 0.18 195); color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); padding: 16px 48px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(38% 0.16 195); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px oklch(55% 0.18 195 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(55% 0.18 195); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; transition-duration: 0.1s; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action on dark or teal surfaces. Transparent background with tinted border. Sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); padding: 15px 47px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid oklch(97% 0.005 195 / 0.40); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(97% 0.005 195 / 0.08); border-color: oklch(97% 0.005 195 / 0.70); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(97% 0.005 195 / 0.60); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Hero Panel
components.description: Full-bleed Oxidized Teal section. The committed color in its primary role. Poppins 800 display headline.
components.html:
WHAT WE BUILD

Make Momentum Visible

OptiTech moves with conviction. Precise where it counts, bold everywhere else.
components.css: .ds-panel-hero { background: oklch(55% 0.18 195); padding: 128px 64px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 32px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.10em; color: oklch(75% 0.09 195); text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel-hero__headline { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); margin: 0; max-width: 12ch; } .ds-panel-hero__body { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(97% 0.005 195 / 0.75); margin: 0; max-width: 50ch; } .ds-panel-hero__actions { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-panel-hero__btn-primary { background: oklch(12% 0.012 195); color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); padding: 16px 48px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s; } .ds-panel-hero__btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(20% 0.022 195); } .ds-panel-hero__btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(12% 0.012 195); padding: 15px 47px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid oklch(12% 0.012 195 / 0.40); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s; } .ds-panel-hero__btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(12% 0.012 195 / 0.08); border-color: oklch(12% 0.012 195 / 0.70); }

components.name: Dark Content Section
components.description: Press Room dark surface. Feature copy, credentials, serious content. Shows Poppins 700 headline + body.
components.html:
HOW IT WORKS

Precision built for what comes next.

A paragraph demonstrating the reading experience on a dark editorial ground. Press White at 75% opacity keeps the teal tint unified without veering into harsh contrast.
components.css: .ds-section-dark { background: oklch(20% 0.022 195); padding: 96px 64px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; } .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.10em; color: oklch(68% 0.06 195); text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-section-headline { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.75rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); margin: 0; max-width: 22ch; } .ds-section-body { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(97% 0.005 195 / 0.75); margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav on Editorial Black. Wordmark as logo, typographic links at Blueprint, teal CTA button.
components.html:
OPTITECH
  • Product
  • About
  • Contact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 48px; padding: 20px 64px; background: oklch(12% 0.012 195); } .ds-nav__logo { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 40px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(68% 0.06 195); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); } .ds-nav__cta { margin-left: auto; background: oklch(55% 0.18 195); color: oklch(97% 0.005 195); padding: 12px 28px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav__cta:hover { background: oklch(38% 0.16 195); }

narrative.overview:
OptiTech is designed to feel purpose-built by people with a strong point of view. The visual language draws from design-tool precision (Figma, Framer, Arc) — not their fame, but their shared quality of self-referential craft.

Color commits rather than accents. Oxidized Teal fills 30-60% of primary surfaces — a presence, not punctuation. Poppins carries the entire type system: hierarchy through weight and scale, not through serif/sans switching. At display sizes (weight 800, tight tracking), the geometric forms read as impactful and forward-moving.

This system explicitly rejects: generic startup-cream (off-white cards, pastel blobs), corporate navy, and the neon-on-black crypto aesthetic.
keyCharacteristics: Committed teal anchor — a surface color, not an accent
Single geometric sans (Poppins) with weight/scale hierarchy (800 to 400)
Sharp corners everywhere — no pill shapes, no softened cards
Choreographed entrances as brand expression; flat and still at rest
Every neutral tinted toward the teal hue; nothing truly neutral

rules.name: The Committed Rule
rules.body: The teal anchor fills 30-60% of any given view. It is not used sparingly; it is used boldly. Restraint is expressed in the neutrals.

rules.name: The Tint Rule
rules.body: No neutral is ever truly neutral. Every near-white and near-black is tinted toward the primary teal hue at low chroma (0.005-0.022). The palette is unified, not collaged.

rules.name: The Flat Resting Rule
rules.body: No component carries a drop shadow in its default state. Shadows appear only on hover (interactive feedback) and during entrance animations. A resting shadow signals the surface doesn't belong.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy levels differ by at least 100 in font weight. Display 800, Headline 700, Title 600, Body 400. Never two adjacent levels at the same weight.

dos: Do let Oxidized Teal fill large surface areas: hero panels, full-bleed sections, entire backgrounds.
Do use Poppins at display sizes (3rem+) with tight letter-spacing (-0.025em to -0.035em).
Do use weight contrast of 200+ between adjacent type levels.
Do tint every neutral toward the teal hue (chroma 0.005-0.022).
Do use asymmetry and forward tension in layout.
Do choreograph entrances with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1). Elements arrive with vertical offset or opacity transition, then rest.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on all choreographed sequences.
Do meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast on all text, including body over Press Room.
donts: Don't use the SaaS cream aesthetic: off-white backgrounds, rounded pill buttons, pastel gradient blobs.
Don't use the corporate enterprise blue playbook: navy/grey palettes, stock photos, bullet-list features.
Don't let the design read as crypto/Web3: no neon, no floating orbs, no speculative urgency.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid color only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as accent on cards or callouts).
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Use transform and opacity only.
Don't round buttons or cards beyond input's 4px. The sharp-corner geometry is a deliberate identity choice.
Don't use Poppins below 0.75rem. Drop to system-ui below that threshold.
